headline: Is It Time To Reassess KKR (KKR) After This Year’s 31% Share Price Slide
summary: Investors may be wondering if KKR at around US$88.91 offers good value today, or if the price already reflects most of the potential. The stock is down 1.9% over the past week, 3.6% over the past month, and 31.0% year to date, although the 3 year and 5 year returns of 77.8% and 90.0% present a very different picture. Recent coverage has focused on how a prolonged pullback from the 1 year return of negative 25.1% has reset expectations for financial stocks such as KKR, while still leaving...

headline: What's Going On With KKR Stock Thursday?
